dashboardTitle: N5 · Rede · DC Fabric · Switch — Interfaces
notes: Drill-down do N4 DC Fabric Switch para o detalhe completo de uma única interface. Clone do padrão n5-bdc-router-interfaces (2026-07-02).

variables.name: switchName
variables.label: Switch
variables.query: DC1-SPINE-11 — SPINE : DC1-SPINE-11,DC1-SPINE-12 — SPINE : DC1-SPINE-12,DC1-LEAF-101 — LEAF (vPC-A) : DC1-LEAF-101,DC1-LEAF-102 — LEAF (vPC-A) : DC1-LEAF-102,DC1-LEAF-103 — LEAF (vPC-B) : DC1-LEAF-103,DC1-LEAF-104 — LEAF (vPC-B) : DC1-LEAF-104,DC1-LEAF-105 — LEAF (standalone) : DC1-LEAF-105
variables.note: Mesma lista/valores do N4 (switchName). Interactivo aqui também — permite trocar de switch directamente no N5.

variables.name: iface
variables.label: Interface
variables.note: Lê directamente a tabela items do Zabbix (MySQL config DB) filtrada por h.host=$switchName — SEM depender de tags BPC. Mesmo padrão comprovado do n5-bdc-router-interfaces. All=.*
